title: Ryanair stock slides 6% as higher fuel costs amid Iran war dent profit
summary_full: Ryanair's first-quarter profit took a 34% hit as consumers delayed bookings due to the Middle East crisis, while struggling airlines face a "difficult winter."
summary_public: Ryanair's first-quarter profit took a 34% hit as consumers delayed bookings due to the Middle East crisis, while struggling airlines face a "difficult winter."

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: higher fuel costs amid Iran war dent profit
